name: Super Micro Computer, Inc.
summary: PART I Our Company We are a Silicon Valley-based provider of total IT solutions which address demanding workloads from the enterprise and cloud to the intelligent edge. We deliver rack-scale solutions optimized for various workloads, including artificial intelligence (AI) and high-performance computing (HPC), where acceleration is critical.
